_publications._publicationTitle: Icariin Promotes Osteogenic Differentiation in a Cell Model with NF1 Gene Knockout by Activating the cAMP/PKA/CREB Pathway.

_contextSnippet: PKA (p-PKA) and phosphorylation of CREB (p-CREB) were significantly activated after treatment with icariin in the 2−7 NF1 cell model
details: Successfully detected PKA phosphorylation by Western blotting and immunofluorescence, showing significant activation after icariin treatment in NF1 knockout cells with time-dependent increase reaching highest level at 120 min
